children.text: To protect your privacy, the passcode is required to launch PrivateSpace.

The authentication email will be sent to the security email address.

In case you forgot the passcode or the way to launch PrivateSpace, you can reset the passcode with the authentication code in the mail.
PrivateSpace can hide its app icon in the apps panel. With the Hide Icon mode enabled, your secret messages and contacts can never be safer!
